name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: A Central Sector scheme that provides income support of Rs. 6,000 per year to all land-holding farmer families. The amount is paid in three equal installments of Rs. 2,000 directly to the bank accounts of the beneficiaries.
benefits: Rs. 6,000 per year (Rs. 2,000 every 4 months) direct bank transfer for agricultural needs.

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana)
description: The world's largest government-funded health insurance scheme providing health coverage of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to poor and vulnerable families.
benefits: Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization. Covers pre and post hospitalization expenses, day care surgeries.

name: PMAY (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana)
description: A government initiative to provide affordable housing to the urban and rural poor. Beneficiaries get financial assistance to construct or enhance their homes, with interest subsidy on home loans.
benefits: Subsidy on home loans up to Rs. 2.67 lakh. Direct financial assistance for house construction/renovation.

name: PMMY (Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana)
description: Provides loans up to Rs. 10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises to help them grow their businesses. Loans are provided through commercial banks, RRBs, and microfinance institutions.
benefits: Collateral-free loans: Shishu (up to Rs. 50,000), Kishore (Rs. 50,001-5 lakh), Tarun (Rs. 5-10 lakh).

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to any rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work. Promotes sustainable development and strengthens rural livelihoods.
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed employment per year at minimum wages. Unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days.

name: PM Scholarship Scheme
description: Provides scholarships to encourage technical education for wards of ex-servicemen and widows of ex-servicemen. Also covers students pursuing professional degree programs. Promotes higher education among economically backward students.
benefits: Rs. 25,000 per year for boys and Rs. 30,000 per year for girls pursuing professional degree programs.

name: PMJDY (Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana)
description: A national mission for financial inclusion to ensure access to financial services for all households across the country. Provides a basic savings bank account with RuPay debit card, accident insurance, and overdraft facility.
benefits: Zero balance savings account, RuPay debit card, Rs. 2 lakh accident insurance, Rs. 30,000 life insurance, overdraft facility up to Rs. 10,000.

name: Karnataka Rythu Bandhu Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance to farmers in Karnataka for crop cultivation. The scheme offers Rs. 10,000 per acre per year to help with farming expenses.
benefits: Rs. 10,000 per acre per year for farming expenses.

name: Maharashtra Agriculture Loan Waiver Scheme
description: Waives outstanding loans for farmers in Maharashtra who have loans up to Rs. 1 lakh. Helps alleviate debt burden on small and marginal farmers.
benefits: Waiver of loans up to Rs. 1 lakh for eligible farmers.

name: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme
description: Provides health insurance coverage to families in Tamil Nadu. Covers hospitalization expenses up to Rs. 4 lakh per family per year.
benefits: Health insurance coverage up to Rs. 4 lakh per family per year.
